data.description:
Let agent steps emit a declared schema, not only review_result findings.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] RunRequest gains optional output_schema/mode (defaulted, backward-compatible).
- [ ] Findings-finalization (build_result/resolve_citations/validate_result) becomes one strategy.
- [ ] review_ticket/review_code/scan_spec and FakeRunner/LangGraphRunner/DeepAgentsRunner unaffected.
Files: src/rebar/llm/runner.py, src/rebar/llm/findings.py
data.title: WS-D1: Generalize RunRequest + findings-finalization strategy
